questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Effect During the last six months the sale of four wheelers has come down in comparison to the sale of four wheelers last year for the same period. Which of the following can be the possible cause for the effect mentioned above?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Cause School authority has increased the tuition fee excessively from the current academic session. Which of the following can be possible effect of the cause mentioned above?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Cause There has been incessant rain during the last 48 h. Which of the following can be a possible effect for the cause mentioned above?

solutions.solution: (e) Companies may hike the price to cover the loss because of the increased tax. But increase in price is totally the matter of company, we cannot make any guesses about it.
(c) It should be the obvious cause for the given effect.
(b) We often hear of accidents leading to such injuries.
(a) The decision of hiking the procurement price of a crop may encourage the farmers to cultivate it.
(d) In such a cataclysmic scenario, the Government is likely to order the closure of offices and schools.
(c) Option (b) is also possible but its possibility can only be after declaring the areas as drought regions.
(c) It is the obvious possible cause.
(c) Government's directive is followed on priority basis.
(c) It is the obvious possible cause.
(c) All may be the possible causes.
(c) Only III can be the possible effect.
(c) I, II and III, all the three can be the possible effects.
